zh.History and genealogy of a branch of the: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jane Apleby於1450年出生在英國賀福爾賀福德時，她的父親James Appleby36歲，母親Mrs. James Apleby21歲。她於1469年與Sir John Weaver在威爾士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她於1470年住在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。她去世於1494年在英國賀福爾賀福德享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jane Apleby于1450年出生在英国賀福爾賀福德时，她的父亲James Appleby36岁，母亲Mrs. James Apleby21岁。她于1469年与Sir John Weaver在威尔士拉德諾斯爾普雷斯泰尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她于1470年住在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。她去世于1494年在英国賀福爾賀福德享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Apleby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, and Cumbria, named from Old English æppel or Old Norse epli ‘apple’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jane Apleby was born in 1450, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, her father, James Appleby, was 36 and her mother, Mrs. James Apleby, was 21. She married Sir John Weaver in 1469, in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She lived in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom in 1470. She died in 1494, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jane Apleby est née en 1450, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, James Appleby, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mrs. James Apleby, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Weaver en 1469, à Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle a vécu à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1470. Elle est décédée en 1494, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Jane Apleby 1450 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Appleby 36 und ihre Mutter Mrs. James Apleby 21. Sie hat 1469 in Presteigne, Radnorshire, Wales Sir John Weaver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1470 hat sie in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1494 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Apleby è nata il nel 1450 nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, James Appleby, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Mrs. James Apleby, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Weaver nel 1469, nel Presteigne, Radnorshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Vissuto a Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1470. Morì nel 1494, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Aplebyが1450年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで生まれた時，父James Applebyは36歳，母Mrs. James Aplebyは21歳であった。1469年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアプレステイグンでSir John Weaverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1470年にはイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードに住んでいた。彼女は1494年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Apleby(이)가 1450년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Appleby(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. James Apleby(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1469년 웨일스 라드노르실르 프레스테익니에서 Sir John Weaver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1470년도에 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 살았다. 그녀는 1494년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Apleby nasceu em 1450, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Appleby, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. James Apleby, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Weaver em 1469, em Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela viveu em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1470. Ela faleceu em 1494, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jane Apleby родилась в 1450 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени James Appleby было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. James Apleby, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Weaver в 1469 г. в местности престиин, радноршир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она жила в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1470 году. Она умерла в 1494 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Jane Apleby nació en 1450, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Appleby, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mrs. James Apleby, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir John Weaver en 1469, en Presteigne, Radnorshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Vivió en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1470. Murió en 1494, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
